stages.concept:
# Unit 050: 과거완료의 용법 (완료, 결과) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 과거완료의 용법 중 **완료**와 **결과**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **완료** 용법은 과거의 특정 시점 이전에 **이미 완료된** 일을 나타내요.

**Q. 다음 중 과거완료의 완료적 용법에 해당하는 경우를 고르세요.**
1. 나는 역에 도착할 때까지 두 시간 동안 음악을 들었다.
2. 내가 역에 도착했을 때 그 기차는 막 출발했다. ✅

> When I arrived at the station, the train **had** just **left**.
> 내가 역에 도착했을 때, 기차는 막 출발했다.

> I **had** already **finished** eating when he started to eat.
> 그가 식사를 시작했을 때 나는 이미 식사를 끝냈다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **결과** 용법은 과거의 특정 시점 이전에 일어난 일의 **결과**가 그 시점까지 영향을 주고 있는 상태를 나타내요.

**Q. 다음 중 과거완료의 결과적 용법에 해당하는 경우를 고르세요.**
1. 나는 작년 말까지 세 번 지갑을 잃어버렸다.
2. 나는 지갑을 잃어버려서 버스를 탈 수가 없었다. ✅

> They **had gone** to London when I visited them.
> 내가 그들을 방문했을 때, 그들은 런던에 가고 없었다.

> I **had lost** my wallet, so I couldn't take the bus.
> 나는 지갑을 잃어버려서 버스를 탈 수가 없었다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 완료는 과거 시점 전에 '이미 끝난' 일, 결과는 과거 시점에 '영향이 남아있는' 상태! 잘 구별할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 050: 과거완료의 용법 완료, 결과 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
The bus (     ) when I arrived at the bus stop.
> **정답** had already left

---

**02.** When I arrived at the meeting place, my friends ? .
> **정답** had already left

---

**03.** The show ? when we arrived.
> **정답** had just started

---

**04.** When we arrived at the zoo, my dad found that he ? the tickets.
> **정답** hadn't bought

---

**05.** Amy ? her key, so she had to buy a new one yesterday.
> **정답** had lost

---

**06.** 다음 문장에 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
When my mom arrived at home, I had already finished my homework.
완료 / 결과
> **정답** 완료

---

**07.** My grandparents had gone to Japan. I couldn't meet them last Sunday.
결과 / 완료
> **정답** 결과

---

**08.** He had quit his job, so he started looking for a new one.
완료 / 결과
> **정답** 결과

---

**09.** Mom had finished washing dishes when I entered the kitchen.
결과 / 완료
> **정답** 완료

---

**10.** My mom hadn't made dinner until I did my homework.
완료 / 결과
> **정답** 완료

---

**11.** 아빠가 도우러 왔을 때 나는 이미 프로젝트를 끝낸 상태였다.
힌트 come, to, help, complete
I already the project when my dad me.
> **정답** had, completed, came, to, help

---

**12.** 내가 식당에 들어갔을 때 그들은 저녁을 다 먹은 상태였다.
힌트 enter, finish
They eating dinner when I the restaurant.
> **정답** had, finished, entered

---

**13.** 버스에 탔을 때, 나는 숙제를 가져오지 않은 것을 알았다.
힌트 get on, not, bring
When I the bus, I found that I my homework.
> **정답** got, on, had, not, brought

---

**14.** 그녀는 다리를 다쳐서 소풍을 갈 수 없었다.
힌트 hurt, can't, go
She her leg, so she on a field trip.
> **정답** had, hurt, couldn't, go

---

**15.** 아빠는 엄마가 수리공을 부르기 전에 이미 차를 고친 상태였다.
힌트 call, fix
My dad already his car before my mom a repairman.
> **정답** had, fixed, called

---

**16.** 내가 집에 왔을 때, 가족들은 벌써 저녁 먹으러 나갔다.
힌트 gone / out / had / already
When I came home, my family for dinner.
> **정답** had, already, gone, out

---

**17.** 집에 오는 길에 나는 교실에 우산을 두고 온 것을 깨달았다.
힌트 my / umbrella / had / left
On the way home, I realized that I in the classroom.
> **정답** had, left, my, umbrella

---

**18.** 엄마가 심부름을 시키기 전에 나는 글짓기를 다 썼다.
힌트 had / writing / finished
I an essay before my mom gave me an errand.
> **정답** had, finished, writing

---

**19.** Tom은 엄마가 방에 들어가기 전에 게임을 멈췄다.
힌트 the game / playing / stopped / had
Tom before his mom entered the room.
> **정답** had, stopped, playing, the, game

---

**20.** 그가 영국에 가버렸기 때문에 나는 어젯밤 그를 독서 모임에서 만날 수 없었다.
힌트 gone / to / had
He England, so I couldn't meet him at the book club last night.
> **정답** had, gone, to
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 050: 과거완료의 용법 완료, 결과 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
<보기> They had already moved a lot of luggage when
I met them.
He had been to my house twice by the time it
was winter.
When the class started, she hadn't arrived at
school yet.
We had already taken this class when we
looked at the notice.
They had gone to Italy when I visited them.
> **정답** When the class started, she hadn't arrived at school
yet., We had already taken this class when we looked
at the notice.

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My mom __________ cooking dinner when I came
back home.
had just finished
finish
has just finished
finishes
> **정답** had just finished

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He didn't take the bus, because he __________ his
wallet somewhere.
loses
had lose
has lost
had lost
> **정답** had lost

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀가 도착했을 때 영화는 막 시작했다.
The movie had just began when she arrives.
The movie has just begun when she arrived.
When she had arrived, the movie has just
begun.
The movie had just begun when she arrived.
> **정답** The movie had just begun when she arrived.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He had run out of money when he came back
from the trip.
He had driven for three hours until he arrived
at the rest stop.
By the time pay day came, she had already
spent all her money.
He had gone to work when I called.
I had just remembered his name when I met
him.
> **정답** He had gone to work when I called.

---

**06.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom realized that he had left his backpack on
the bus.
When we arrived at the hotel, he had gone to
Paris.
I had just finished taking a shower when Tom
called.
When I saw her, she had already been ready.
He had already done his homework by the
time my mom came home.
> **정답** When we arrived at the hotel, he had gone to Paris.

---

**07.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Because the bus had just left, we had to take a
taxi.
Amy has been a dancer for ten years before
she became a teacher.
Tom wasn't hungry, because he had already
eaten lunch.
Before she came to Korea, she has watched K-
movie a lot.
He has lost his glasses, so he had to buy new
ones.
> **정답** Tom wasn't hungry, because he had already eaten
lunch.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 용법이 다른 문장을 고르시오.
She had already cleaned her room before her
mother ordered it.
He had just finished his homework when his
mom called him.
By the time he got home, the light had already
turned on in his room.
They had lost their key. They couldn't open
the door.
> **정답** They had lost their key. They couldn't open the door.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He had already made a plan before he worked
on the project.
He has already left for his home when I
arrived.
I turned on the lights in the house when it got
dark.
It had already been daytime when I woke up.
> **정답** He has already left for his home when I arrived.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He __________ when the coach called a player.
The soccer team __________ before the game
started.
has warmed up - has cheered
had warmed up - had cheered
warm up - cheered
have warmed up - have cheered
• warm up 준비운동하다
• cheer 응원하다
> **정답** had warmed up - had cheered

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The rain __________, so we played outside.
He __________ her by the time he met her in person.
has just stopped - has trusted
had just stopped - had trusted
have just stopped - have trusted
just stop - trusted
• in person 직접[몸소]
> **정답** had just stopped - had trusted

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He __________out items in the refrigerator before he
went grocery shopping.
I __________ nervous by the time the test started.
has checked - has been
have checked - have been
had checked - had been
check - was
> **정답** had checked - had been

---

**13.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom found a four-leaf clover
before he bought the lottery
ticket.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** found → had found

---

**14.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
The rain has just stopped
when I opened my umbrella.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**15.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Amy checked the room before
she opened.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** checked → had checked

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
He has already read the
handbook before he clicked the
button.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Before he watched the movie,
he has finished already watching
the TV series.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has finished already → had already finished

---

**18.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
Tom has already cleaned his room when he left
home.
have already cleaned
had already cleaned
cleans
has already clean
> **정답** had already cleaned

---

**19.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분을 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오.
It is already full of people when he went to the ticket
booth.
had already been full
had already be full
has already been full
had already full
> **정답** had already been full

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
There has been a music contest
yesterday. Tom won the third
prize last year. He tries his best until
the day before the competition held. But he
made a mistake at the competition.
He was very disappointed.
• the day before 그 전날
> **정답** was, won, had tried, made, was
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 050 과거완료의 용법 완료, 결과중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 강당에 들어갔을 때 그는 연설을 이미 끝냈다.
힌트 (     ) already, finish, his, speech
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  when I
entered the auditorium.
정답 had, already, finished, his, speech

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 자동차를 사기 전에 이미 운전면허를 땄다.
힌트 (     ) already, get
He  (     )   (     )   (     )  his driver's license before
he bought a car.
정답 had, already, got (gotten)

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 나무를 베기 전 이미 나무는 죽었다.
힌트 (     ) already, die
The tree  (     )   (     )   (     )  before he cut it
down.
정답 had, already, died

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Minha가 학교에 입학하기 전 이미 모든 교과과정을 끝냈
다.
힌트 (     ) already, complete
Minha  (     )   (     )   (     )  all the curriculum
before she entered school.
정답 had, already, completed

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (축약형 사용)
look, not, finish
A: Your mom  (     )  angry yesterday. What
happened?
B: I  (     )   (     )  my homework yet. She scolded
me.
• scold 혼내다
정답 looked, hadn't, finished

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
already, start
A: Did you go to her birthday party yesterday?
B: No, The party  (     )   (     )   (     )  when I woke
up.
정답 had, already, started

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
master, take
A: How did you win first place in the English test?
B: I  (     )   (     )  English before I  (     )  the test.
정답 had, mastered, took

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
go to
A: Did you meet her yesterday?
B: I went in a hurry. But she  (     )   (     )  
the airport.
정답 had, gone, to

---

**09.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/050_desc_01.webp)
완성하시오.
already, boil
The water  (     )   (     )   (     )  before he put the
noodles in the water.
정답 had, already, boiled

---

**10.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
![그림](public/images/units/050_desc_10.webp)
완성하시오.
already, leave
When she entered the classroom, everyone 
  (     )  for home.
정답 had, already, left

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 050: 과거완료의 용법 완료, 결과 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
<보기> They had already packed a lot of bags when I met them.
He had been to my school twice by the time it was spring.
When the class started, she hadn't arrived at school yet.
We had already finished this task when we looked at the board.
They had gone to London when I visited them.
> 정답: When the class started, she hadn't arrived at school

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My dad __________ making dinner when I came back home.
had just finished finish has just finished finishes
> 정답: had just finished

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He didn't take the train, because he __________ his ticket somewhere.
loses had lose has lost had lost
> 정답: had lost

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 도착했을 때 수업은 막 시작했다.
The class had just began when he arrives.
The class has just begun when he arrived.
When he had arrived, the class has just begun.
The class had just begun when he arrived.
> 정답: The class had just begun when he arrived.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He had run out of snacks when he came back from the picnic.
He had walked for two hours until he arrived at the rest area.
By the time pay day came, she had already spent all her money.
He had gone to school when I called.
I had just remembered her name when I met her.
> 정답: He had gone to school when I called.

---

**06.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Jake realized that he had left his bag on the bus.
When we arrived at the hotel, he had gone to Seoul.
I had just finished cleaning my room when Amy called.
When I saw her, she had already been ready.
He had already done his project by the time my dad came home.
> 정답: When we arrived at the hotel, he had gone to Seoul.

---

**07.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Because the train had just left, we had to take a taxi.
Mina has been a singer for five years before she became an actress.
Amy wasn't hungry, because she had already eaten lunch.
Before she came to Korea, she has listened to K-pop a lot.
He has lost his key, so he had to call his mom.
> 정답: Amy wasn't hungry, because she had already eaten

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분의 용법이 다른 문장을 고르시오.
She had already tidied her desk before her teacher asked.
He had just finished his project when his dad called him.
By the time he got home, the light had already turned on in his room.
They had lost their map.
They couldn't find the way.
> 정답: They had lost their map. They couldn't find the way.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He had already made a schedule before he started the work.
He has already left for his home when I arrived.
I turned on the heater in the house when it got cold.
It had already been morning when I woke up.
> 정답: He has already left for his home when I arrived.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She __________ when the teacher called a student.
The class __________ before the lesson started.
has warmed up - has cheered had warmed up - had cheered warm up - cheered have warmed up - have cheered
